curation_notes: Re-curation of GHSA-cj2h-ww36-v932. The patch commit is the merge of PR #7023 into master (f5441e69). Only one non-test source file was changed (nomad/server.go). The vulnerability was in the getTLSConf function, which set up TLS for incoming RPC connections but did not validate the peer certificate's DNS names or CommonName for the correct role (client/server) and region. The patch adds a VerifyPeerCertificate callback (rpcNameAndRegionValidator) that checks certificate SANs and CommonName against expected role and region patterns. Vulnerability class kept as crypto-weakness (CWE-295 Improper Certificate Validation). Location derived from the patch diff.
